mapper.update:
update room
store_id = #{storeId},
room_type_id = #{roomTypeId},
capacity = #{capacity},
room_name = #{roomName},
status = #{status},
description = #{description},
pic = #{pic},
REMARK = #{remark},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, store_id, room_type_id, capacity, room_name, status, description, REMARK, pic from room where id=#{id}

select room.id as id, room.name as name, room.capacity as capacity, room.price as price, room.description as description, file.url as picture from room_type room left join system_file file on room.picture = file.id
